descriptions.home.show_normal_media_player: If the normal Media Player should show (The black box with Play / Pause, Next, and Previous)
descriptions.home.show_whats_playing: If the title of whats playing should show. This will be positioned above or below the media controls and will show if the media controls aren't showing
descriptions.home.media_player_position: Where should the media controls / player be positioned
descriptions.home.background_cycle_interval: The amount of time in seconds before the background cycles to a new Wallpaper
descriptions.home.background_fade_duration: How long the fade animation should be when a Wallpaper cycles
descriptions.home.images: Home Background's Path for Cycling Images
descriptions.home.pinned: The Path to your Pinned Image for the Home Background
descriptions.home.widget_margin: The Outer Margin of Widgets on the Home Page
descriptions.accessibility: Settings to make use of this app easier
descriptions.accessibility.handles_open_on_touch: Drawer Handles instead of needing a swiping action, require just a touch to open
descriptions.application.window.size: Set the size of the window. NOTE: this doesn't effect the actual size, its a reference
descriptions.application.window.position: Where the window will position itself on startup
descriptions.application.window.auto_lock: Whether the app will automatically on startup, position at X and Y, then fullscreen
descriptions.notifications.notification_queue_delay: The delay in seconds between notifications in queue
descriptions.notifications.notification_duration: How long a notification stays on screen
descriptions.plugins.media.username: Your Username for your music API
descriptions.plugins.RTSP_streaming.ip: Local IP Address to the security System
descriptions.plugins.RTSP_streaming.port: the PORT the RTSP stream uses
descriptions.plugins.RTSP_streaming.channels: The number of channels your System supports
